name: Tofu Spinach Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400°F.
2. In a large pan over medium flame, cook spinach in canola oil until the spinach completely wilts (it will shrink and turn a darker green).
3. In another pan, sauté onions and garlic until the onion softens.
4. Mix in the cooked spinach, sautéing for a minute or two more.
5. Crumble in the tofu.
6. Add lemon juice and salt.
7. Pour mixture into pie shell.
8. Bake at 400°F about 30 minutes, until the pie shell is golden.
Start off with a salad, then serve the spinach tofu pie with wild rice for a great veggie meal.
